indications.text:
Postmenopausal Osteoporosis:
ACTONEL is indicated for the treatment and prevention of osteoporosis in postmenopausal
women.
Treatment of Osteoporosis:
In postmenopausal women with osteoporosis, ACTONEL increases BMD and reduces the
incidence of vertebral fractures and a composite endpoint of nonvert...
